The platform connects to over 100 WMS platforms and various channels to ingest data and follows customer SOPs. Description: Ethernovia provides deterministic, high-bandwidth Ethernet networking designed to unify sensors, compute, and external data in modern vehicles. The company builds Ethernet-native packet processors, PHYs, scalable switches, and software-defined networking stacks to deliver multi-gigabit, low-latency links for ADAS, autonomy, and ECU consolidation. Its technology leverages Ethernet standards and custom silicon (including 7nm PHY implementations) to enable real-time, safety-oriented communication and AI-driven interconnects. Ethernovia is a B2B supplier to automotive manufacturers and Tier 1 suppliers seeking to simplify vehicle architecture and support software-defined services.
